title: Isaac Liu
description: New Zealand & Samoa international rugby league footballer
extract:
Isaac Liu (born 26 April 1991) is a professional rugby league footballer who plays as a loose forward and prop forward for the Leigh Leopards in the Super league and New Zealand at international level.
He has previously played for the Sydney Roosters in the NRL and won back-to-back NRL premierships with that club in 2018 and 2019. He represented Samoa earlier in his career at international level.
